title: Moon-Research agent frontmatter (v1)
description: Canonical YAML frontmatter every agent in agents/**/*.md must satisfy after the P1 migration. Validated by workflows/_dispatch.js on load.

model.description: Specific model id or 'inherit'. Default 'inherit' if omitted by migration.

tools.description: Host tools this agent may invoke. Required for any agent that grounds claims (must include WebFetch or paper_fetcher.py-via-Bash).

reads.description: Glob list of paths this agent reads. Used by reviewers to validate evidence provenance.

writes.description: Glob list of paths this agent writes.

memory.description: Path to this agent's chronological memory file (P2 RAG memory).

rigor_contract.description: Doctrine the agent operates under. P0+ requires three-times-verified on every dispatched agent.

panel.description: Which panel this agent belongs to. 'executor' = pipeline executor; 'support' = utility (kb-manager etc.).

weight.description: Panel weight; 0 for executors and support agents.

critical_axes.description: Axes on which this expert can unilaterally veto (score<60 -> veto regardless of weighted aggregate).

embedding_model.description: Model used to build this agent's private RAG index (P2).

parallelism_contract.description: Default-parallel contract per shared/references/parallelism-doctrine.md. 'max-fanout' = the agent fans out all independent sub-work concurrently (default for all agents). 'serial-justified' = the agent intentionally serializes; requires a comment in its prose explaining why.
